# BlueFox Email

> Email platform with send-based pricing, stop paying for contacts you don't email. Every feature serious email platforms offer, nothing hidden behind upgrades. 3,000 free sends to start.

BlueFox Email covers transactional emails, triggered emails, marketing campaigns, automations, segmentation, analytics, and a visual email theme/design system with templates that render consistently across Gmail, Apple Mail, mobile, and Outlook. Built on AWS SES with bring-your-own-SES option. Serves SaaS companies, marketing agencies running multiple clients, Amazon SES users, and occasional senders. Founded by Gyula Németh (edmdesigner.com, chamaileon.io, emailhero.io) — 10+ years building for real-world email. Also publishes free deliverability tools (DKIM/DMARC/SPF/MX/link checkers) and educational content on email-sending fundamentals, AWS SES concepts, and SaaS email best practices.

## Product

- [Pricing](https://bluefox.email/pricing): send-based pricing tiers

- [Meet the Team](https://bluefox.email/meet-the-team): team members
